revision.comment: [[Template:DisestcatCountry]] now needs no year parameters, replaced: {{DisestcatCountry|194|5|Japan}} → {{DisestcatCountry|Japan}}
revision.text:
{{DisestcatCountry|Japan}}
[[Category:1945 disestablishments in Asia|Japan]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text:
{{DisestcatCountry|Japan}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

{{DisestcatCountry|Japan}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:kkkk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:dd]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{DisestcatCountry|Japan}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:1945 disestablishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:1945 disestablishments in Japan]][[Category:dd]]

{{DisestcatCountry|Japan}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:1945 disestablishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:1945 disestablishments in Japan]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:kkkk]]" to ""
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (7 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (8 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 8 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8141306)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{DisestcatCountry|Japan}} {{wikidata link|Q8141306}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1945 disestablishments in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:1945 disestablishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22542364787|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1945_disestablishments_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
